name: Laser Maze - Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Laser Maze - Puzzle is a puzzle game in which you must direct lasers at targets using various types of blocks. Strategically move the blocks to reflect the lasers and hit the target. Each level challenges your puzzle-solving and spatial reasoning skills. Feeling stuck? Use the hint button in the top right corner for some guidance! Can you solve every laser maze in one go? How to play Laser Maze - Puzzle? Click and drag to move the blocks! Who created Laser Maze - Puzzle? Laser Maze - Puzzle is created by ArtyDev. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Laser Maze - Puzzle for free? You can play Laser Maze - Puzzle for free on Poki. Can I play Laser Maze - Puzzle on mobile devices and desktop? Laser Maze - Puzzle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
